# VaultSpace Staging

**Application Status:**
- Web: [ca-vaultspace-web](https://ca-vaultspace-web.victoriousglacier-374689f2.eastus.azurecontainerapps.io)
- Health: [API Health Check](https://ca-vaultspace-web.victoriousglacier-374689f2.eastus.azurecontainerapps.io/api/health?deep=true)

**Resources:**
- Container Apps Environment
- PostgreSQL Flexible Server
- Azure Cache for Redis
- Azure Blob Storage
- Key Vault
